overall.description: A static cinematic view of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter video game, showing students dining at long house tables beneath thousands of floating candles in a grand Gothic hall with high vaulted ceilings and stone architecture. The warm candlelight illuminates the scene while students in robes sit and converse at the tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand Gothic dining hall with floating candles and long house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from the rear of the room, overlooking the students at their tables

entered.detail: thousands of lit candles floating magically in the air above the dining tables, providing warm illumination
four long wooden house tables laden with food and lined with students in dark robes
tall Gothic stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling along the left wall
tall Gothic stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling along the right wall
tall arched windows with colored glass panels between the stone pillars
tall arched windows with colored glass panels between the stone pillars
high Gothic vaulted ceiling with wooden beams disappearing into the shadows above the floating candles

segments.scene_description: A static view of the iconic Great Hall, filled with students dining at long wooden tables beneath thousands of magically floating candles. The Gothic architecture features tall stone pillars, arched stained glass windows, and a high vaulted ceiling. Warm candlelight bathes the scene while students in dark robes sit and eat, creating an atmosphere of magical academia.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of the Great Hall, capturing the timeless atmosphere of magical academia. It begins with a wide view of the iconic space, where students in dark robes dine at long wooden tables. The camera lingers on the Gothic architecture, emphasizing the tall stone pillars and arched stained glass windows that support a high vaulted ceiling. Finally, the scene is bathed in a warm, flickering glow as thousands of magically floating candles illuminate the entire hall.
